title: OH it IS everything!
body:
I love them all but do have my favorites.
  Who knew that doing laundry would become a " No, that's MINE" argument!  
I selfishly keep these for my clothes and linens and tell my other family members to please feel free to use the "other" detergent but keep your paws off my Mozi.
  Love it so much that I am now buying as birthday gifts to my family~

But I like the different scents and my laundry smells divine.

title: Didn’t expect this to be my son’s favorite
body: Don’t let the pink packaging fool you- this is scent is clean, a little bit masculine and just the right amount of fragrance. I really thought it would be fruity or perfume like, but it was actually very fresh and clean. My two teenage sons  have chosen this as  their favorite of all of the scents. And we have tried them all!

title: Honestly, the best laundry detergent I've ever used.
body:
I have extremely sensitive skin. I was using another brand for awhile and it was fine for my skin, but as a sports family I felt like our clothes always stunk [which I never liked] & our clothes weren't getting as clean as I would like. I was hoping to find a company that washed our clothes well, left a nice scent (not overpowering like Tide or others) & something that wouldn't make my skin break out in rashes all over.  After using Mozi for a few weeks now, I'm happy to report that our clothes are clean, smell really nice and my skin isn't angry! 

Highly recommend this brand for anyone!

title: Could be a perfume
body: The Desert Poppy Mozi must room spray is so good. It’s light and fresh. It makes the house feel so warm and inviting without being obvious that a room spray was used. It’s like a good perfume that isn’t overpowering, just a light clean scent. Love this stuff!! The spray cap and pump is like a perfume too so you can target areas instead of blasting too much around like some of the other aerosols.

title: This is the most incredible scent…
body: This fragrance is one of the most incredible things I’ve ever smelled!!! The way the detergent cleans clothes is great, low suds in my washing machine, so it really helps my machine run well for each load…BUT YOU GUYS,  THE SMELL! Oh my god, it’s so lux. Don’t tell anyone, but sometimes I even use the room spray as a little extra burst of perfume on my clothes! So so gorgeous! I get complimented all the time! Love this product and we’ll be a Mozi Family now for life!
